column1: # estimate_weights.tsv - per-signal complexity weights for /sap-docs-estimate (deterministic scorer).
# score = SUM(signal_count * weight). Override the whole file at {custom_url}\estimate_weights.tsv.
# source_file = the spec work-folder file the signal is counted from; count_mode = how rows are counted.
# Weights are rough structural proxies (person-day-ish); the bands they map to are deliberately WIDE and
# every report is labelled uncalibrated until record-actuals + calibrate (v1.5) tighten them.

column5: a selection screen exists at all
each error message (each needs a provoking test)
each ERROR row in a docs-check result (real rework risk)
each WARNING row in a docs-check result
